author: saiken
description: Report the notes you never wrote: unexplained link pairs, stub hubs, and decisions with no stated reason. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Israel Avila

manifest.name: Unwritten

name: Unwritten

releases.author: israerusan
releases.description:
Report the notes you never wrote: unexplained link pairs, stub hubs, and decisions with no stated reason.

The optional Pro semantic feature uses the Second Read engine — a local, offline sidecar installed in one click and SHA-256-verified. Free features need no engine.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/israerusan/unwritten/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
